name: trading-framework
description: Modular web trading MVP foundation with Next.js, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, and Docker Compose.

scripts.dev: sh -c 'npm run dev:api & npm run dev:web & wait'
scripts.api-test: sh -c 'test -f .env || cp .env.example .env; docker compose build api && docker compose run --rm api sh -c "APP_ENV=test alembic upgrade head && APP_ENV=test pytest"'
scripts.market-data-test: sh -c 'test -f .env || cp .env.example .env; docker compose --profile services build market-data && docker compose --profile services run --rm --no-deps market-data pytest'
scripts.web-test: npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.test: npm run api-test && npm run market-data-test && npm run web-test
scripts.db:upgrade: docker compose run --rm api alembic upgrade head
scripts.db:downgrade: docker compose run --rm api alembic downgrade -1
scripts.db:current: docker compose run --rm api alembic current
scripts.db:revision: docker compose run --rm api alembic revision --autogenerate -m
scripts.seed: sh -c 'test -f .env || cp .env.example .env; docker compose build api && docker compose run --rm api sh -c "alembic upgrade head && python -m app.cli.seed_symbols"'
scripts.lint:api: docker compose build api && docker run --rm trading-framework-api ruff check app tests
scripts.format:api: docker compose build api && docker run --rm trading-framework-api ruff format app tests
